response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development experience with a focus on testability and user experience, but lacks direct alignment with the core requirements of the Technical Lead — Cloud Compute Platform role, particularly in C++ and large-scale distributed systems leadership.
strengths: Extensive experience in full-stack development and open-source projects, showcasing adaptability and technical breadth.
Proven leadership in mentoring, workshops, and technical talks, indicating strong communication and knowledge-sharing skills.
Diverse technical background with exposure to distributed systems, cloud technologies (AWS), and DevOps practices.
concerns: Limited recent experience with C++ (core requirement), with most work in TypeScript, Node.js, and other languages.
No explicit evidence of leading large-scale cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at a technical leadership level.
Lacks direct experience in production-level cloud architecture balancing short- and long-term needs, a preferred qualification.
